creator: tmilker+freebsd-bugs@gmail.com
text:
Here's the build failure you get with portupgrade on 13.3-RELEASE-p3, if it helps.  Removing the protobuf port fixed it for me as well.

--- plugin/group_replication/protobuf/CMakeFiles/gr_protobuf_lite.dir/all ---               
[ 59%] Running C++ protobuf compiler on /usr/ports/databases/mysql80-server/work/mysql-8.0.39/plugin/group_replication/protobuf/replication_group_member_actions.proto - lite version   
cd /usr/ports/databases/mysql80-server/work/.build/plugin/group_replication/protobuf && ../../../runtime_output_directory/protoc --cpp_out /usr/ports/databases/mysql80-server/work/.build/plugin/group_replication/generated/protobuf_lite -I /usr/ports/databases/mysql80-server/work/mysql-8.0.39/extra/protobuf/protobuf-24.4/src -I/usr/ports/databases/mysql80-server/work/mysql-8.0.39/plugin/group_replication/protobuf /usr/ports/databases/mysql80-server/work/mysql-8.0.39/plugin/group_replication/protobuf/replication_group_member_actions.proto          
ld-elf.so.1: /usr/ports/databases/mysql80-server/work/.build/runtime_output_directory/protoc-24.4.0: Undefined symbol "_ZN4absl12lts_2023080213time_internal4cctz15local_time_zoneEv"
